title: Radiation, Light and Illumination
subtitle: A Series of Engineering Lectures Delivered at Union College

known_editions.notes: Canonical local scan for initial processing.
Google Books reports a 1910 second edition with 305 pages.
Several public scans identify a 1918 third edition.

public_domain_notes: The 1909 edition is a United States publication before 1931.
Wikimedia Commons marks the Internet Archive scan as public domain in the United States.
Repository-wide license review is still recommended before final public release.

notes: Text is readable enough for discovery and candidate extraction.
Mathematical notation, Greek letters, fractions, and page headers require manual verification.
Scanned figures are represented only by OCR captions and must be extracted from the PDF or IA image files.
